TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_lmyun, title = lmyun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/lmyun} }

S.FORM: lmyun bisya' lela, pnungan maha yow na iny'anux cyoli Tayal, utux bwax lmyun ga ba'un thapuy utux limuk mami, musa mluyak hlahuy ga nanak utux bwax lmyun rasun, ru cyan iyik biku kya, nanu yaca musa tna' ni'an naha pisa ryax la. ana ga babow nya laga, mlux musa piyux bwax lmyun thapuy Tayal la? pn'yuwan yow kwe ga nyu makaca cn'ringan nya. 'txan maki utux tngangah, kya maha musa slhbow yow ro ini ci soya pnahu' puni' hiya krryax, mkalux kwara reyas nya wayal sglu'an sgelu', kruma yhul ga si sbu' ro'iy nya wa sglu'an sgelu', ro si nya tkuniy sa'ing pyatu bwax iyik na limuk kya, tegan yow ga piyux ci lmyun hnpuyan nya ro mhenas limuk spun mami la, "pyak pyak" maha hngiyan hnapuy nya, tbah wa m'piyit mlaka kwara hnpuy nya lmyun haca, beta puting kyan utux piyit nya si hngiy bih limuk kya, skayal nya tngangah na cyoli haca maha: "yani isu m'elang na cyoli, baley ci ga musa ungat ci kwara ni'un su, utux lwey ga, mwah myan baley kuri' mani kwara pnuhi su lmyun, sphow mu isu m'elang na cyoli." aring kya laga, utux bwax lmyun ga ini ba'iy phapuy utux limuk mami na lmyun la.

lmyun bisya' lela, pnungan maha yow na iny'anux cyoli Tayal, utux bwax lmyun ga ba'un thapuy utux limuk mami, musa mluyak hlahuy ga nanak utux bwax lmyun rasun, ru cyan iyik biku kya, nanu yaca musa tna' ni'an naha pisa ryax la. ana ga babow nya laga, mlux musa piyux bwax lmyun thapuy Tayal la? pn'yuwan yow kwe ga nyu makaca cn'ringan nya. 'txan maki utux tngangah, kya maha musa slhbow yow ro ini ci soya pnahu' puni' hiya krryax, mkalux kwara reyas nya wayal sglu'an sgelu', kruma yhul ga si sbu' ro'iy nya wa sglu'an sgelu', ro si nya tkuniy sa'ing pyatu bwax iyik na limuk kya, tegan yow ga piyux ci lmyun hnpuyan nya ro mhenas limuk spun mami la, "pyak pyak" maha hngiyan hnapuy nya, tbah wa m'piyit mlaka kwara hnpuy nya lmyun haca, beta puting kyan utux piyit nya si hngiy bih limuk kya, skayal nya tngangah na cyoli haca maha: "yani isu m'elang na cyoli, baley ci ga musa ungat ci kwara ni'un su, utux lwey ga, mwah myan baley kuri' mani kwara pnuhi su lmyun, sphow mu isu m'elang na cyoli." aring kya laga, utux bwax lmyun ga ini ba'iy phapuy utux limuk mami na lmyun la.
S.PHON: lmjun βis~ɕjaʔ lela, pnuŋan maħa jow na injʔanux ʦ~ʨjoli tajal, utux βwax lmjun ɣa βaʔun tħapuj utux limuk mami, mus~ɕa mlujak ħlaħuj ɣa nanak utux βwax lmjun ras~ɕun, ru ʦ~ʨjan ijik βiku kja, nanu jaʦ~ʨa mus~ɕa tnaʔ niʔan naħa pis~ɕa rjax la. ana ɣa βaβow nja laɣa, mlux mus~ɕa pijux βwax lmjun tħapuj tajal la? pnʔjuwan jow kwe ɣa nju makaʦ~ʨa ʦ~ʨnʔriŋan nja. ʔtxan maki utux tŋaŋaħ, kja maħa mus~ɕa s~ɕlħβow jow ro ini ʦ~ʨi s~ɕoja pnaħuʔ puniʔ ħija krrjax, mkalux kwara rejas~ɕ nja wajal s~ɕɣluʔan s~ɕɣeluʔ, kruma jħul ɣa s~ɕi s~ɕβuʔ roʔij nja wa s~ɕɣluʔan s~ɕɣeluʔ, ro s~ɕi nja tkunij s~ɕaʔiŋ pjatu βwax ijik na limuk kja, teɣan jow ɣa pijux ʦ~ʨi lmjun ħnpujan nja ro mħenas~ɕ limuk s~ɕpun mami la, "pjak pjak" maħa ħŋijan ħnapuj nja, tβaħ wa mʔpijit mlaka kwara ħnpuj nja lmjun ħaʦ~ʨa, βeta putiŋ kjan utux pijit nja s~ɕi ħŋij βiħ limuk kja, s~ɕkajal nja tŋaŋaħ na ʦ~ʨjoli ħaʦ~ʨa maħa: "jani is~ɕu mʔelaŋ na ʦ~ʨjoli, βalej ʦ~ʨi ɣa mus~ɕa uŋat ʦ~ʨi kwara niʔun s~ɕu, utux lwej ɣa, mwaħ mjan βalej kuriʔ mani kwara pnuħi s~ɕu lmjun, s~ɕpħow mu is~ɕu mʔelaŋ na ʦ~ʨjoli." ariŋ kja laɣa, utux βwax lmjun ɣa ini βaʔij pħapuj utux limuk mami na lmjun la.
